title: address_part returns String; could return Cow<str> for All case
description: message.rs address_part already internally computes bare_address as Cow<'_, str>. For AddressPart::All it calls bare.into_owned() unconditionally, forcing a heap allocation even when bare is already Cow::Borrowed (i.e. no angle brackets or trailing comments). Changing the return type to Cow<'_, str> would eliminate this allocation in the common bare-address path. The LocalPart and Domain arms must still return owned strings because they are subslices of the internally-created Cow.
